context.description: The project has multiple feature tasks implemented or in progress. Some logic may be duplicated across tasks (e.g. stats, comments, notifications), causing inconsistency and maintenance issues.

objectives.objective: Unify implementation into a single source of truth
Prevent redundant APIs and database structures

requirements.requirement: Check if multiple APIs update the same data (e.g. stats)
Check if similar database tables exist for same purpose
Check if frontend duplicates logic already handled by backend
Ensure article statistics are NOT manually updated via separate APIs (stats must be derived from Comment and HelpfulnessRating tables)
Ensure comment system is the ONLY source of comment count
Ensure notification system listens to events (comment, reply) instead of duplicating comment logic
Ensure reactions and helpfulness are not duplicated systems unless intentionally separated
Ensure each feature has a single source of truth

acceptance_criteria.criteria: No duplicate APIs for same functionality
All derived data comes from a single source

notes.note: Prefer refactoring over adding new logic
